eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Kankakee, IL; at 4:45 PM on JUN 11, 2026 Effective until 5:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Tornado Warning for Kankakee County until 730 pm take cover and tune to local radio for further updates
